description: Smoke-test fixture covering every category-routed judge prompt: single_hop, multi_hop, temporal, knowledge_update, and abstention. Always vendored. Three cases reuse one conversation to exercise multi-session reconciliation; the rest are self-contained.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: Hey, I'm Alex. Just wanted to share something fun.

turns.speaker: Aura
turns.content: Tell me.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: I just adopted a black Labrador. We named her Pepper because she's full of energy.

cases.question: Where does Alex's new colleague live?

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: I'm joining a new project at work.

turns.speaker: Aura
turns.content: Who are you working with?

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: My new colleague is Maria. She's leading the data platform team.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: Maria and I had a coffee chat this morning.

turns.speaker: Aura
turns.content: Anything interesting?

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: She mentioned she's been working remotely from Berlin for two years.

cases.question: When did Alex start the new job at Stripe?

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: Big update on my side.

turns.speaker: Aura
turns.content: Go on.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: I joined Stripe in March 2024. It's been a wild ride since.

cases.question: Which database does the team use in production?

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: We're prototyping the new service on MongoDB.

turns.speaker: Aura
turns.content: Got it.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: Schema is flexible which helps while we iterate.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: Update on the database decision.

turns.speaker: Aura
turns.content: What changed?

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: We migrated off MongoDB. Production runs on Postgres now — the relational model fit the data better.

cases.question: What is Alex's mother's maiden name?

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: I want to fly to Lisbon next month.

turns.speaker: Aura
turns.content: Sounds great.

turns.speaker: Alex
turns.content: Booked TAP for the 12th. Will stay for a week.
